title: Armor Additions
description: Rename your armor in an anvil to give it an additional look!
body:
**[​OPTIFINE REQUIRED]**

Renaming any piece of armor (except leather armor and the turtle helmet) in an anvil to ''Emerald/Amethyst/Quartz/Resin armor'' will change the texture of the item and model.

Example: renaming ''Diamond Chestplate'' to ''Emerald Chestplate'' in an anvil will give you the emerald chestplate model and item texture.

Note: Armor trims do work, but you can only see it on the model when equiped and not on the item texture. If you know how to fix this please contact me on discord: hedach761#0397

Credit to Nera Minus for the textures of the quartz armor items and models: https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/quartz-colored-netherite-java/
